3526052965.title: Relife Relizema Ultra Hydrating Lotion 400ml - Dermacare Moisturizing Body with Aloe Vera & Vitamin E - Soothing & Hydrating for Sensitive Skin
3526052965.detail_text: Specifications BrandRelifeSKU3526052965_SGAMZ-23256998920Body Care BenefitsMoisturizingCountry of ManufactureItalyFormulation FeaturesNon-Sticky/Greasy FormulaProduct FormLotion What’s in the box 400ml/btl Qualification License Type SG_HSA License Code Highlights Relife Relizema Ultra Hydrating Lotion 400ml - Dermacare Moisturizing Body with Aloe Vera & Vitamin E - Soothing & Hydrating for Sensitive Skin Relizema Ultra Hydrating Lotion hydrates, moistures and protects sensitive and dry skin. It is a daily care lotion for dry and sensitive skin and/or with an atopic tendency in adults and children formulated without fragrances, paraben, silicones and paraffins to minimise the risk of sensitisation. Relizema Ultra Hydrating Lotion helps restore the natural skin barrier due to the innovative combination of compounds which contain three different types of ceramides. In addition, it has a blend of vegetable oils which increase skin hydration and skin elasticity and a fat-soluble complex of liposoluble ceramides, which protects the skin. Relizema Ultra Hydrating Lotion is dermatologically tested. Directions:Apply on affected area as needed. Ingredients: AQUA, BUTYROSPERMUM PARKII BUTTER, HYDROGENATED POLYISOBUTENE, ETHYLHEXYL STEARATE, GLYCERIN, CETEARYL ALCOHOL, METHYLPROPANEDIOL, CETEARYL GLUCOSIDE, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, POTASSIUM CETYL PHOSPHATE, XANTHAN GUM, PHENYLPROPANOL, LINUM USITATISSIMUM SEED OIL, PRUNUS AMYGDALUS DULCIS OIL, OLEA EUROPAEA FRUIT OIL, DISODIUM EDTA, C12-15 ALKYL BENZOATE, BORAGO OFFICINALIS SEED OIL, TRIBEHENIN, SODIUM LAUROYL LACTYLATE, SODIUM HYDROXIDE, TOCOPHEROL, CERAMIDE NG, PEG-10 PHYTOSTEROL, CERAMIDE NP, PHENOXYETHANOL, LACTIC ACID, CERAMIDE AP, PHYTOSPHINGOSINE, CHOLESTEROL, CARBOMER, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, PALMITOYL HEXAPEPTIDE-12, CERAMIDE EOP. Relizema Ultra Hydrating Lotion helps restore the natural skin barrier due to the innovative combination of compounds which contain three different types of ceramides.

In addition, it has a blend of vegetable oils which increase skin hydration and skin elasticity and a fat-soluble complex of liposoluble ceramides, which protects the skin. Relizema Ultra Hydrating Lotion is dermatologically tested.

3603431236.detail_text: Description: This nourishing revitalizing cream nourishes, soothes and protects dry, dull skin. It targets all signs of fatigue (drawn features and dull complexion) and comforts uncomfortable skin lacking nourishment, thanks to its nourishing agents combined with softening emollient oils. Its melting texture leaves a soft, non-greasy veil on the skin, to reveal its natural glow. Formulated with red fruits extracts, and a stable form of antioxidant vitamin E, that effectively reduces signs of fatigue, as well as softening, soothing and anti-irritating Avène Thermal Spring Water. Dry skin regains suppleness and comfort, and leaves skin complexion radiant.

6447948.detail_text: Features: Derma AC+ Clear Foam prevents skin troubles by effectively cleansing away keratin and sebum with its thick and smooth lather. By further cleansing deep inside the pores, skin is allowed to breathe freely, therefore giving you a fresh and clean complexion. ACNE CARE SYSTEM: Our professional care line products free you from skin troubles by effectively and actively controlling excess sebum and keratin. Scientifically treats acne skin by combining the anti-bacterial and effective benefits of Tea Tree Oil and Centella Asiatica extract to bring you the best of skin science. ACTIVE INGREDIENTS: Protects you from troubles caused by excess sebum secretion and effectively cares for skin thanks to its strong ability to fight bacteria, soothe and purify skin. Ficus Carica, Portulaca Cleracea and Licorice extracts help to strengthen skin's natural protective layer and stimulate skin's texture restortation to care for the skin's foundation and promote a healthy complexion. How to Use : Take an appropriate amount and lather with water. Massage onto face gently. Rinse with lukewarm water.

This revolutionary nourishing cream, specially formulated to address the needs of sensitive, dry, and irritated skin. The key ingredients in our formula include Sitchopus Horrens and Channa Striatus, which work in harmony with our proprietary 7 herbs botanical extracts. These core ingredients have been carefully selected for their soothing and healing properties. Sitchopus Horrens (sea cucumber) and Channa Striatus are known for their skin repairing and anti-itch properties, helping to calm irritated skin and reduce redness. On the other hand, our proprietary 7 herbs botanical extracts provide deep hydration and lock in moisture to prevent trans-epidermal water loss (TEWL), a common cause of dry skin. Health+ Dermacare Skin Repair Cream is designed to be easily absorbed and deeply penetrate the skin, delivering nourishing benefits to the affected areas. Crafted with care, this non-steroidal moisturizing cream is free from colorants, chemicals, and preservatives. Unlock the power of soothing and rejuvenating skin care with Health+ Dermacare Skin Repair Cream, your ultimate companion on the journey to revitalize and nourished skin. 3446797976.title: OILAGE ANTIOXIDANT SERUM, 30ML BOTTLE
3446797976.detail_text: OILAGE ANTIOXIDANT SERUM Oilage Antioxidant Serum intensively revitalizes the skin, restoring its firmness and youthful appearance. This serum contains the patent-pending Trioleum™ Complex, which activates the biological functions of youthful skin, enhancing its hydration, density, elasticity, firmness, and smoothness. Thanks to the inclusion of Renovage™, this serum prolongs the life cycle of skin cells and increases the replication capacity of fibroblasts, the cells responsible for producing collagen, hyaluronic acid, and elastin. This helps the epidermal extracellular matrix regain its integrity and density. Additionally, the high content of antioxidants in Argan Oil, Olive Oil, Almond Oil, and Phytosqualane protects the skin against free radicals, thereby preventing premature aging. Active Ingredient: TriOleum™ complex (Soybean Oil, Avocado Oil, Evening Primrose Oil, Soy Isoflavones), Renovage™, Almond Oil, Olive Oil, Argan Oil, Phytosqualane-squalane & Vitamin E Method of Adminstration Choose the way you want to use it: Apply a few drops of the serum to the face and neck, gently massage and pat, leave to be absorbed. Apply a few drops of the serum to the face and neck that is moistened with water, gently massage and pat, leave to be absorbed. Moisten the palm of your hand with water and then apply a few drops of the serum to it. Rub the moistened area vigorously with the fingers of the other hand until it yields a milk-like texture. Apply the obtained emulsion to the face and neck, gently massage and pat, leave to be absorbed. Caution Perform a patch on a small area of skin to check for any allergic reactions or irritation before using it on your face. Ensure the serum does not get into your eyes. If it does, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. If you experience redness, itching or irritation, stop using the product immediately and consult a dermatologist. Keep the serum in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and out of reach of children.
